Siberian State Medical University, Russia

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at Siberian State Medical University, Russia, ensuring personalized and comprehensive support throughout the application and enrollment process.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Russia
  • July 11, 2024
  • Home
  • Russia
  • Siberian State Medical University, Russia
# Russia

Siberian State Medical University, Russia

Established in 1878, Siberian State Medical University (SibMed) is a leading choice for Indian students pursuing MBBS in Russia. Recognized as Russia’s sole flagship medical university since 2017, SibMed boasts a unique multidisciplinary university hospital. The faculty comprises 80% specialists holding academic degrees and titles, with 50% actively practicing doctors. Students benefit from training at a state-of-the-art simulation center—one of only two in Russia accredited by the European Society for Simulation in Medicine (SESAM).

In 2015, SibMed became Russia’s first medical university accredited by Skolkovo Technopark. It also holds recognitions from the World Directory Of Medical Schools (WDOMS), Educational Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG), Foundation for Advancement of International Medical Education and Research (FAIMER), World Federation for Medical Education (WFME), and formerly from the Medical Council of India (MCI)/National Medical Commission (NMC).

Ranking of Siberian State Medical University, Russia

Siberian State Medical University (SSMU) is ranked among the top 100 universities globally.

It is recognized as one of the top 30 medical universities in Russia.

In 2003, SSMU was ranked among the top 3 medical universities in Russia.

Currently, it holds the 70th position among Russia’s best medical universities.

Globally, SSMU is ranked 3012 among the best medical universities

Why Choose Siberian State Medical University, Russia?

Choosing Siberian State Medical University (SSMU) in Russia offers aspiring medical students a compelling blend of renowned academic excellence, modern infrastructure, and a culturally enriching environment. Recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC) of India and boasting a faculty comprised of 80% specialists with academic distinctions, SSMU ensures high-quality medical education with access to state-of-the-art facilities. With a history spanning over 130 years and a diverse student body from more than 120 nationalities, SSMU provides not only a path to becoming a certified medical professional but also a global perspective on healthcare and a vibrant community for personal and academic growth.

  • Siberian State Medical University (SSMU) is highly popular among Indian students choosing to study MBBS in Russia.
  • It offers high-quality medical education with a highly qualified faculty, 80% of whom hold academic degrees and titles, and 50% are practicing doctors.
  • SSMU is recognized by the NMC (National Medical Commission) of India.
  • The university boasts modern infrastructure, including smart laboratories and advanced classrooms, at one of Russia’s largest hospitals.
  • It is selected by the Russian government for projects aimed at increasing educational exports.
  • SSMU provides comfortable hostel accommodation, resourceful libraries, and access to global research practices and symposiums.
  • The university offers a cultural exchange environment with students from over 120 nationalities.
  • With a history spanning over 130 years, SSMU has certified over 60,000 doctors and 40,000 medical specialists.
  • It offers courses in English, making it accessible to international students, and supports internship opportunities.
  • SSMU alumni include prominent figures, such as two Presidents of the Russian Academy of Medical Sciences.

Accreditation & Recognition of Siberian State Medical University, Russia

Siberian State Medical University holds prestigious accreditations and recognitions:

  • Accredited by the Ministry of Science and Higher Education of the Russian Federation.
  • Recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC) of India.
  • Accredited by the World Health Organization (WHO).
  • Recognized by UNESCO.
  • Maintains international partnerships with various prestigious medical institutes worldwide

Eligibility Criteria for Siberian State Medical University, Russia

To be eligible for admission to MBBS at Siberian State Medical University (SSMU), prospective students must meet the following criteria:

  • Academic Qualifications: Applicants should have scored a minimum of 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology in their High School (Secondary Education) examinations.

  • NEET Qualification: Students are required to possess qualifying marks in the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET), a mandatory requirement for Indian students aspiring to study MBBS abroad.

  • Language Proficiency: Proficiency in English is essential. Applicants need to provide proof of English language proficiency through tests such as IELTS or TOEFL. This ensures that students can effectively engage in coursework and clinical training conducted in English.

These criteria ensure that students have the necessary academic foundation and language skills to successfully pursue MBBS studies at Siberian State Medical University.

Duration of MBBS at MBBS at Siberian State Medical University, Russia

The MBBS program at Siberian State Medical University (SSMU), like other Russian universities registered under the Ministry of Science and Higher Education of the Russian Federation, follows a standardized course structure. The duration of the MBBS program at SSMU is 6 years:

  • Five years of classroom studies cover theoretical and practical aspects of medical education.
  • The sixth year involves a mandatory internship, where students gain hands-on experience in clinical settings. This internship typically takes place in some of the best hospitals in Russia, providing students with practical exposure to medical practices.
  • During the course, students also have the opportunity to work in hospitals alongside their studies, further enhancing their understanding of medical procedures and patient care.

This comprehensive structure ensures that students graduating from SSMU are well-prepared to enter the medical profession with a thorough grounding in both theoretical knowledge and practical experience.

Documents Required Admission For MBBS at Siberian State Medical University, Russia

For admission to MBBS at Siberian State Medical University (SSMU) in Russia, prospective students need to prepare the following documents:

  • Mark sheets of 10th (Secondary School) grades.
  • Mark sheet of 12th (Higher Secondary School) grades.
  • Transfer Certificate from the previous school or institution.
  • 6 passport size photographs.
  • Migration Certificate (if applicable, for students transferring from another university).
  • Medical reports from a recognized hospital confirming the absence of HIV or AIDS.
  • Health insurance from a government-recognized agency.
  • Eligibility certificate from the National Medical Commission (NMC) of India (for Indian students).

These documents are essential for completing the admission process at SSMU, ensuring that students meet the necessary academic, health, and administrative requirements for pursuing their MBBS degree in Russia.

Faculties at Siberian State Medical University, Russia

Siberian State Medical University provides a diverse array of educational opportunities through its various faculties, each specializing in distinct areas of medical and healthcare education:

  • Faculty of General Medicine: Offers comprehensive training in general medical practice.

  • Faculty of Dental Medicine: Focuses on dental health and oral care education.

  • Faculty of Pediatrics: Specializes in pediatric medicine and healthcare for children.

  • Faculty of Pharmacy: Provides education in pharmaceutical sciences and drug therapy.

  • Faculty of Advanced Nursing Education: Offers advanced training for nursing professionals.

These faculties cater to different aspects of medical education, ensuring that students receive specialized knowledge and skills necessary for their chosen healthcare professions.

Benefits Of Studying MBBS At Siberian State Medical University, Russia

Global Reputation: Russia is renowned for its excellence in medical education, making it a prime destination for aspiring medical professionals.

Exposure to Advancements: Students completing MBBS courses in Russia encounter the latest advancements in medical science, enhancing their knowledge and skills.

State-of-the-Art Facilities: SSMU boasts top-tier laboratories equipped with modern technology essential for comprehensive studies and research.

Cultural Diversity: SSMU facilitates cultural exchange and mingling, providing students with a rich cultural experience and opportunities to interact with peers from diverse backgrounds.

Focus on Professionalism: The university’s primary goal is to provide top-quality education that prepares students to excel as healthcare professionals globally.

Cultural Immersion: Students can explore local customs and traditions alongside their studies, enriching their educational experience.

Opportunities for Work: SSMU allows students to work while studying, enabling them to gain practical experience and exposure to modern medical practices

Student Life at Tver State Medical University, Russia

Student life at Siberian State Medical University (SSMU) offers a vibrant and supportive environment conducive to both academic and personal growth:

  • Recreation Program: Throughout the year, students can engage in various sports activities such as basketball, tennis, football, skiing, skating (in winters), and swimming (in summers).

  • Interest-Based Clubs: SSMU hosts several clubs including the Student Scientific Society, English Speaking Club, and Volunteer Clubs, providing opportunities for students to pursue their interests outside of academics.

  • Accommodation: International students have access to 6 dormitories equipped with internet connectivity and basic amenities. Indian cuisine is available to cater to students from India.

  • Library and Cultural Programs: The university’s medical library is accessible to all students, and cultural programs are organized for special occasions, fostering a sense of community and celebration among students.

  • Student-Teacher Ratio and Security: SSMU maintains a favorable student-teacher ratio, ensuring personalized attention and support. The campus and hostels are secured 24/7, ensuring the safety of all students.

  • Scientific Engagement: Student scientific societies within each faculty enable participation in seminars, conferences, and youth forums at national and international levels, encouraging academic and professional development.

This enriching environment at SSMU not only supports academic excellence but also promotes holistic development and cultural integration among its diverse student body.
